## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Mara Leighton (GrowthX) and Vanessa Sauter (PromptFoo) to discuss content quality issues and potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PromptFoo's content needs aren't being met due to AI-generated "word slop" and lack of technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Current content misses the mark on tone, industry understanding, and audience-appropriate technicality](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Manual rewrites by Vanessa have been necessary for all GrowthX-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Action items: side-by-side comparisons, LLM analysis, and exploring technical writing options](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Issues

  - [AI-generated content recognizably "sloppy" and lacks authentic industry voice](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Consistently misses technical accuracy required for PromptFoo's highly specialized audience](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [No GrowthX articles have been publishable without complete rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Issues persist despite feedback, due to non-technical writers lacking industry knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Audience Mismatch

  - [PromptFoo's readers: model builders, QA specialists, security experts in LLM space](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Content often includes irrelevant code snippets or misunderstood concepts](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [GrowthX's broader audience focus doesn't align with PromptFoo's niche technical needs](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Potential Solutions

  - [Side-by-side comparison of Vanessa's rewrites vs. GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Use LLM to analyze differences between original and rewritten content](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Feed PromptFoo's documentation and published articles to AI for tone matching](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Tighter parameters on AI research, heavily weighting PromptFoo's content](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Explore involving more technical writers in the process](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Background Discussion

  - [Mara: Ex-journalist (Business Insider), content marketing for startups, now at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Vanessa: Former policy journalist, transitioned to tech 5-6 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Both noted trend of journalists moving to tech due to unstable media market](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to discuss issues with GrowthX team and explore immediate corrections](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Conduct side-by-side comparisons of rewritten vs. original articles](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Investigate product-level changes or more manual processes to improve output](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Consider looping in technical writers for specialized content](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Explore using LLMs as judges for content quality and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/xNueN9L4dAFKbHdzspTrkEo44KCPzmCf?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
